rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal — Ukraine war continues as background, Iran talks stalled, SpaceX IPO is a financial curiosity with no immediate Portuguese impact.

top_events.title: SpaceX IPO debuts, Musk becomes first trillionaire
top_events.summary: Major US market event; could influence EU investor sentiment and Portuguese pension/investment funds marginally, but no direct daily-life impact.

top_events.title: Trump-Iran deal public dispute
top_events.summary: Continued Iran-US nuclear stalemate keeps global energy prices uncertain; indirect and mild effect on Portuguese energy bills.

top_events.title: Ebola spreads into new areas of DR Congo
top_events.summary: Ebola expansion in DRC is geographically distant from Portugal; no travel or trade links that would elevate risk for Portuguese residents at this stage.
